Asset Identification
▪ 	It’s important to identify and gather all your assets
▪ 	Most people forget about may of their assets you already
have (including me)
▪ 	Dig your well before you’re thirsty
▪ 	This exercise is a great map on how to gather more assets
▪ 	Most of these assets come through adding value to other
people’s lives
Module One - Asset Identification
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Asset Building QuickStart
▪ 	Start on all the long term stuff immediately
▪ 	Start publishing on Social Media
▪ 	Start building a presence in forums in your niche
▪ 	Identify top blogs, start making intelligent comments
Module One - Asset Identification

-- 8 of 9 --

Asset Building QuickStart
▪ 	Identify 10 experts in your market and rank them
▪ 	Approach #10 for an interview
▪ 	Then go to #9, then #8…
▪ 	After you have confidence, then go to #1
▪ 	Record the calls, get them transcribed
▪ 	Next - start building your list
▪ 	Squeeze page and Lead Magnet
